title: Naples, Campania — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Naples, Campania: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Naples is a city in Campania with a population of 914,000. A vibrant Mediterranean city at the foot of Mount Vesuvius, birthplace of pizza, with a historic center, dramatic coastline, and passionate street life.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
